 {"id":"gt-0vu9e","title":"Add unit tests for internal/mrqueue package","description":"attached_args: mrqueue package tests

Add comprehensive tests for the merge request queue package.

## Files to create
- internal/mrqueue/mrqueue_test.go

## Test cases to cover
1. NewQueue creates queue directory
2. Add() persists MR to queue
3. Get() retrieves MR by ID
4. List() returns all MRs
5. Remove() deletes MR
6. MR serialization/deserialization
7. Queue handles concurrent access

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] internal/mrqueue/mrqueue_test.go created
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
- [ ] Tests pass: go test ./internal/mrqueue/...
- [ ] Coverage > 70%","status":"hooked","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-28T15:49:12.750237-08:00","created_by":"gastown/crew/max","updated_at":"2025-12-28T15:57:05.876953-08:00"}
 {"id":"gt-0wpnf","title":"Digest: mol-deacon-patrol","description":"Patrol 17: all healthy","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-28T15:56:45.271323-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-28T15:56:45.271323-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-28T15:56:45.271291-08:00"}
-{"id":"gt-0x5og","title":"Dogs: Deacon's Helper Workers","description":"## Overview

Dogs are reusable workers managed by the Deacon for infrastructure and cleanup tasks.
They parallel how Polecats serve the Witness, but at town level with cross-rig scope.

## Key Concepts

- **Dogs**: Deacon-managed, reusable, infrastructure/cleanup tasks
- **Kennel**: Where dogs live (`deacon/dogs/`)
- **Multi-rig worktrees**: Dogs have worktrees into multiple rigs for cross-rig work

## Cats vs Dogs

| Aspect | Polecats | Dogs |
|--------|----------|------|
| Manager | Witness | Deacon |
| Scope | Per-rig | Town (cross-rig) |
| Lifecycle | Ephemeral | Reusable |
| Work | Features | Infrastructure |
| Location | `<rig>/polecats/` | `deacon/dogs/` |

## Implementation

### Phase 1: Dog Infrastructure
- `gt dog add/remove/list/call/status` commands
- Kennel directory structure (`~/gt/deacon/dogs/`)
- Multi-rig worktree creation
- Dog state tracking

### Phase 2: Deacon Dispatch
- Sling support for `deacon/dogs` target
- Pool management (spawn/retire logic)
- Completion mail handling

### Phase 3: Infrastructure Formulas
- mol-convoy-cleanup
- mol-dep-propagate
- mol-digest-generate

### Phase 4: Deacon Refactor
- Patrol becomes detect → dispatch
- Heavy work moves to dog slings

## Reference

- docs/patrol-system-design.md#dogs-deacons-helper-workers
- docs/PRIMING.md (Role Taxonomy)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:00.808508-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-30T11:01:08.625414-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T11:01:08.625414-08:00","close_reason":"All dog infrastructure complete: CLI, sling support, patrol refactor, formulas"}
+{"id":"gt-0x5og","title":"Dogs: Deacon's Helper Workers","description":"## Overview

Dogs are reusable workers managed by the Deacon for infrastructure and cleanup tasks.
They parallel how Polecats serve the Witness, but at town level with cross-rig scope.

## Key Concepts

- **Dogs**: Deacon-managed, reusable, infrastructure/cleanup tasks
- **Kennel**: Where dogs live (`deacon/dogs/`)
- **Multi-rig worktrees**: Dogs have worktrees into multiple rigs for cross-rig work

## Cats vs Dogs

| Aspect | Polecats | Dogs |
|--------|----------|------|
| Manager | Witness | Deacon |
| Scope | Per-rig | Town (cross-rig) |
| Lifecycle | Ephemeral | Reusable |
| Work | Features | Infrastructure |
| Location | `<rig>/polecats/` | `deacon/dogs/` |

## Implementation

### Phase 1: Dog Infrastructure
- `gt dog add/remove/list/call/status` commands
- Kennel directory structure (`~/gt/deacon/dogs/`)
- Multi-rig worktree creation
- Dog state tracking

### Phase 2: Deacon Dispatch
- Sling support for `deacon/dogs` target
- Pool management (spawn/retire logic)
- Completion mail handling

### Phase 3: Infrastructure Formulas
- mol-convoy-cleanup
- mol-dep-propagate
- mol-digest-generate

### Phase 4: Deacon Refactor
- Patrol becomes detect → dispatch
- Heavy work moves to dog slings

## Reference

 {"id":"gt-0x5og.1","title":"gt dog add/remove/list/call/status CLI","description":"Dog management commands:
- gt dog add <name> - Create dog in kennel with multi-rig worktrees
- gt dog remove <name> - Retire dog, cleanup worktrees
- gt dog list - Show the pack (all dogs with status)
- gt dog call [name] - Wake idle dog(s)
- gt dog status [name] - Show detailed dog state","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"gastown/polecats/furiosa","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:24.005184-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-30T10:41:57.247255-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T10:41:57.247255-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented all gt dog CLI commands: add, remove, list, call, status","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-0x5og.1","depends_on_id":"gt-0x5og","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:24.005762-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-0x5og.1","depends_on_id":"gt-0x5og.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:37.683244-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"gt-0x5og.3","title":"gt sling support for deacon/dogs target","description":"Extend gt sling to support dog targets:
